title: The end of Ask.com, and the shifting sands of internet use
summary: After a 25-year run, Ask Jeeves has officially shut down as part of a strategic shift by parent company IAC. Launched in 1996 as a conversational search engine, the platform's closure reflects a broader transition in internet usage away from traditional search towards AI-driven direct answers.
